payload.answer: There is a conflict between two concurrent memory writes: “Sam works at Goldman” and “Sam joined Point72.” Safe actions available are: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit. Choose approve_supersession only if the Point72 update should replace the Goldman employment fact. Choose keep_both if both statements should remain true or be preserved as separate facts. Choose reject_new if the new Point72 statement should not be stored. Choose edit if the wording needs to be corrected or clarified before saving.
citations: Concurrent writes - Sam works at Goldman Sam joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The input contains two concurrent employment-related writes about Sam with different organizations. It is unclear whether Sam left Goldman for Point72, works at both, or whether one write is incorrect.

details: No durable memory was committed because the conflict requires user resolution.
Did not assume whether Goldman was superseded by Point72.
Did not present either disputed employment fact as current.
